title: Astero
actors: Aliki Vougiouklaki, Titos Vandis, Dimitris Papamichael
plot: Astero, the beautiful step-daughter of a wealthy herder, falls in love with his handsome son, Thimios, whom his father wants to marry off to an affluent shepherdess. Now, she's on the brink of insanity. Can true love set her free?
